since_last: 69% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +3.31%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.42% · BTC +2.76% · Gold +2.15% · Nasdaq100 +1.06%. 69% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +3.31%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +3.31%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.24%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -24.37%
cards.body: Leaders: OKTA +9.47%, CRWD +9.27%, ZS +7.88%, DELL +6.12%, VST +5.87%. Laggards: IBM -24.37%, SKHY -8.63%, WDAY -5.32%, BIDU -4.66%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.38% at $141.06
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.38% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
